attacking_style: Launches big-gear, power-based attacks mid-climb but lacks the explosive acceleration to create decisive gaps. Relies on sustained strength rather than sharp changes of pace.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Medium-gradient climbs where sustained power is advantageous; struggles on steep pitches requiring rapid acceleration or explosive changes of rhythm.
vulnerability: Organized chase groups can neutralize attacks due to lack of finishing acceleration. Ultra-endurance background doesn't translate to sharp race-winning moves.
key_patterns: Mid-climb attacks using big gears and steady power rather than explosive acceleration.
Attacks immediately draw chase responses, suggesting predictable timing or lack of surprise element.
Strong base fitness from ultra-endurance background but lacks racing-specific explosive qualities.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from early 2020 insufficient to determine trajectory or current form
